scripts.build:cli:
esbuild src/cli/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node22 --outfile=dist/stclaude.mjs --banner:js='#!/usr/bin/env node
import { createRequire } from "node:module"; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);' && chmod +x dist/stclaude.mjs
scripts.install:cli: bun run build:cli && mkdir -p ~/.claude/bin && cp dist/stclaude.mjs ~/.claude/bin/stclaude.mjs && chmod +x ~/.claude/bin/stclaude.mjs && ln -sf stclaude.mjs ~/.claude/bin/stclaude && mkdir -p ~/.claude/stclaude/module && cp -r spacetimedb/src spacetimedb/package.json spacetimedb/tsconfig.json ~/.claude/stclaude/module/ && (cd ~/.claude/stclaude/module && npm install 2>/dev/null || bun install 2>/dev/null || true)
